Name: RELAY_STATE
Description: The actual status of the relay (1 = open, 0 = closed).

Name: IS_RMS_VOLTAGE_MEASURED
Description: Indicates if RMS voltage measuring is available/active.

Name: IS_RMS_CURRENT_MEASURED
Description: Indicates if RMS current measuring is available/active.

Name: IS_ACTIVE_POWER_MEASURED
Description: Indicates if active power measuring is available/active.

Name: IS_REACTIVE_POWER_MEASURED
Description: Indicates if reactive power measuring is available/active.

Name: IS_APPARENT_POWER_MEASURED
Description: Indicates if apparent power measuring is available/active.

Name: IS_POWER_FACTOR_MEASURED
Description: Indicates if power factor measuring is available/active.

Name: IS_AC_FREQUENCY_MEASURED
Description: Indicates if AC frequency measuring is available/active.

Name: ID
Description: The unique identifier of the IEC module.

Name: VERSION
Description: The firmware or hardware version of the IEC module.

Name: IEC_STATUS
Description: The current status of the IEC module

Name: AVAILABLE_LEDS
Description: Number of available LEDs on the module.

Name: CURRENT_LIMIT
Description: The configured maximum current limit.

Name: RELAY_COUNT
Description: Total number of relays present in the module.

Name: RMS_CURRENT
Description: The measured root mean square (RMS) current value.

Name: RMS_VOLTAGE
Description: The measured root mean square (RMS) voltage value.

Name: ACTIVE_POWER
Description: The measured active (real) power.

Name: REACTIVE_POWER
Description: The measured reactive power.

Name: APPARENT_POWER
Description: The measured apparent power.

Name: POWER_FACTOR
Description: The measured power factor (ratio of active to apparent power).

Name: AC_FREQUENCY
Description: The measured AC grid frequency.

Name: CUSTCURR_WARNING_LIMIT
Description: Custom current limit threshold that triggers a warning.

Name: CUSTCURR_ERROR_LIMIT
Description: Custom current limit threshold that triggers an error.

Name: OC_TRESHOLD
Description: Overcurrent threshold limit for protection mechanisms.
